label: snow leopard
description: large felid native to the mountains of Central and South Asia

label: Ursus maritimus
description: species of bear native largely within the Arctic Circle

label: zebra
description: African subgenus of Equus of the horse family

label: donkey
description: subspecies of mammal (donkey as a domesticated subspecies); beast of burden, similar to a horse, but smaller

label: goat
description: domesticated mammal raised for its meat and milk

label: African bush elephant
description: species of mammal; largest land animal

label: koala
description: arboreal herbivorous marsupial native to Australia

label: Tasmanian devil
description: species of carnivorous marsupial from Australia

label: platypus
description: semi-aquatic egg-laying mammal endemic to Australia

label: Capybara
description: species of large semiaquatic rodent in the cavy family

label: common bottlenose dolphin
description: best-known species of the dolphin family

label: Orcinus orca
description: species in the oceanic dolphin family

label: Balaenoptera musculus
description: species of marine mammal, largest living animal in the world

label: chimpanzee
description: species of mammal; species of ape

label: chicken
description: domesticated bird kept by humans primarily as a food source

label: Meleagris
description: North American genus of large birds

label: Bald Eagle
description: species of bird of prey found in North America

label: Emperor Penguin
description: large flightless seabird endemic to Antarctica

label: Rock Dove
description: species of pigeon; the wild bird from which domesticated pigeons derive

label: Galápagos tortoise
description: Chelonoidis species complex in the Galápagos Islands; species with many subspecies

label: goldfish
description: species of freshwater fish, common in aquariums

label: Danaus plexippus
description: milkweed butterfly in the family Nymphalidae

label: Musca domestica
description: species of insect in the class "Muscidae", sort of fly

label: Anisoptera
description: suborder of insects with long strong bodies and two pairs of wings

label: earthworm
description: suborder of tube-shaped, segmented annelids in the order Haplotaxida
